news_items.headline: Kiké Hernández completes 3-week rehab assignment
news_items.summary: Kiké Hernández played nine innings at third base in his 12th and final rehab game with Triple-A Oklahoma City on Saturday night. Hernández is expected to be activated off the injured list when the Dodgers return home, manager Dave Roberts told reporters in Milwaukee on Saturday. Hernández was 0-for-4 on Saturday, and in his 12 […]
